steps.title: Use the present-day contrast
steps.content: The passage admits Levin's specific predictions now seem absurd, but says her broader claim matches our current age of disequilibrium and fragmentation. The blank should describe a prediction that turned out to be accurate.

steps.title: Choose foresight over style
steps.content: B concerns how clearly the claim was expressed. C concerns attacking convention. D means ambiguous. The needed word means showing accurate foresight about later conditions. The answer is A.
